summary: The Optimism RPC transaction divergence is semicolon-only rustfmt noise in existing transaction conversion and deposit handling returns; no transaction RPC behavior changed.
notes: Queue entry verified as line 227: M	crates/optimism/rpc/src/eth/transaction.rs.
The isolated patch only adds semicolons to an existing transaction conversion error return and an existing early `return` after deposit transaction swapping.
No typed transaction construction, empty signature creation, deposit input truncation, hash sealing, or swap behavior changed.
